v.CNV: 起初，　神创造天地。
v.ESV: In the beginning, God created the heavens and the earth.
v.GAE: 태초에 하나님이 천지를 창조하시니라
v.KJV: In the beginning God created the heaven and the earth.
v.NASB: In the beginning God created the heavens and the earth.
v.NIV: In the beginning God created the heavens and the earth.
v.NRSV: In the beginning when God created the heavens and the earth,
v.SAENEW: 태초에 하나님이 천지를 창조하셨다.
v.WLB: 하나님께서 태초에 하늘과 땅을 창조하셨습니다.

v.CNV: 地是空虚混沌；深渊上一片黑暗；　神的灵运行在水面上。
v.ESV: The earth was without form and void, and darkness was over the face of the deep. And the Spirit of God was hovering over the face of the waters.
v.GAE: 땅이 혼돈하고 공허하며 흑암이 깊음 위에 있고 하나님의 영은 수면 위에 운행하시니라
v.KJV: And the earth was without form, and void; and darkness was upon the face of the deep. And the Spirit of God moved upon the face of the waters.
v.NASB: The earth was formless and void, and darkness was over the surface of the deep, and the Spirit of God was moving over the surface of the waters.
v.NIV: Now the earth was formless and empty, darkness was over the surface of the deep, and the Spirit of God was hovering over the waters.
v.NRSV: the earth was a formless void and darkness covered the face of the deep, while a wind from God swept over the face of the waters.
v.SAENEW: 땅이 혼돈하고 공허하며, 어둠이 깊음 위에 있고, 하나님의 영은 물 위에 움직이고 계셨다.
v.WLB: 그 땅은 형태가 없고 비어 있었으며 어둠이 깊은 물 위에 있었고 하나님의 영은 수면 위에 움직이고 계셨습니다.

v.CNV: 神说：“要有光！”就有了光。
v.ESV: And God said, “Let there be light,” and there was light.
v.GAE: 하나님이 이르시되 빛이 있으라 하시니 빛이 있었고
v.KJV: And God said, Let there be light: and there was light.
v.NASB: Then God said, 'Let there be light'; and there was light.
v.NIV: And God said, “Let there be light,” and there was light.
v.NRSV: Then God said, “Let there be light”; and there was light.
v.SAENEW: 하나님이 말씀하시기를 "빛이 생겨라" 하시니, 빛이 생겼다.
v.WLB: 하나님께서 말씀하시기를 “빛이 있으라” 하시니 빛이 생겼습니다.

v.CNV: 神看光是好的，他就把光暗分开了。
v.ESV: And God saw that the light was good. And God separated the light from the darkness.
v.GAE: 빛이 하나님이 보시기에 좋았더라 하나님이 빛과 어둠을 나누사
v.KJV: And God saw the light, that it was good: and God divided the light from the darkness.
v.NASB: God saw that the light was good; and God separated the light from the darkness.
v.NIV: God saw that the light was good, and he separated the light from the darkness.
v.NRSV: And God saw that the light was good; and God separated the light from the darkness.
v.SAENEW: 그 빛이 하나님 보시기에 좋았다. 하나님이 빛과 어둠을 나누셔서,
v.WLB: 하나님께서 보시기에 그 빛이 좋았습니다. 하나님께서는 빛을 어둠과 나누셨습니다.

v.CNV: 神称光为昼，称暗为夜。有晚上，有早晨；这是第一日。
v.ESV: God called the light Day, and the darkness he called Night. And there was evening and there was morning, the first day.
v.GAE: 하나님이 빛을 낮이라 부르시고 어둠을 밤이라 부르시니라 저녁이 되고 아침이 되니 이는 첫째 날이니라
v.KJV: And God called the light Day, and the darkness he called Night. And the evening and the morning were the first day.
v.NASB: God called the light day, and the darkness He called night. And there was evening and there was morning, one day.
v.NIV: God called the light “day,” and the darkness he called “night.” And there was evening, and there was morning —the first day.
v.NRSV: God called the light Day, and the darkness he called Night. And there was evening and there was morning, the first day.
v.SAENEW: 빛을 낮이라고 하시고, 어둠을 밤이라고 하셨다. 저녁이 되고 아침이 되니, 하루가 지났다.
v.WLB: 하나님께서 그 빛을 ‘낮’이라 부르시고 그 어둠을 ‘밤’이라 부르셨습니다. 저녁이 되고 아침이 되니 첫째 날이었습니다.

v.CNV: 神说：“众水之间要有穹苍，把水和水分开！”事就这样成了。
v.ESV: And God said, “Let there be an expanse in the midst of the waters, and let it separate the waters from the waters.”
v.GAE: 하나님이 이르시되 물 가운데에 궁창이 있어 물과 물로 나뉘라 하시고
v.KJV: And God said, Let there be a firmament in the midst of the waters, and let it divide the waters from the waters.
v.NASB: Then God said, 'Let there be an expanse in the midst of the waters, and let it separate the waters from the waters.'
v.NIV: And God said, “Let there be a vault between the waters to separate water from water.”
v.NRSV: And God said, “Let there be a dome in the midst of the waters, and let it separate the waters from the waters.”
v.SAENEW: 하나님이 말씀하시기를 "물 한가운데 창공이 생겨, 물과 물 사이가 갈라져라" 하셨다.
v.WLB: 하나님께서 말씀하시기를 “물 가운데 공간이 생겨 물과 물을 나누라” 하셨습니다.

v.CNV: 神造了穹苍，把穹苍以下的水和穹苍以上的水分开了。
v.ESV: And God made the expanse and separated the waters that were under the expanse from the waters that were above the expanse. And it was so.
v.GAE: 하나님이 궁창을 만드사 궁창 아래의 물과 궁창 위의 물로 나뉘게 하시니 그대로 되니라
v.KJV: And God made the firmament, and divided the waters which were under the firmament from the waters which were above the firmament: and it was so.
v.NASB: God made the expanse, and separated the waters which were below the expanse from the waters which were above the expanse; and it was so.
v.NIV: So God made the vault and separated the water under the vault from the water above it. And it was so.
v.NRSV: So God made the dome and separated the waters that were under the dome from the waters that were above the dome. And it was so.
v.SAENEW: 하나님이 이처럼 창공을 만드시고서, 물을 창공 아래에 있는 물과 창공 위에 있는 물로 나누시니, 그대로 되었다.
v.WLB: 이처럼 하나님께서 공간을 만드셔서 공간 아래의 물과 공간 위의 물을 나누시니 그대로 됐습니다.

v.CNV: 神称穹苍为天。有晚上，有早晨；这是第二日。
v.ESV: And God called the expanse Heaven. And there was evening and there was morning, the second day.
v.GAE: 하나님이 궁창을 하늘이라 부르시니라 저녁이 되고 아침이 되니 이는 둘째 날이니라
v.KJV: And God called the firmament Heaven. And the evening and the morning were the second day.
v.NASB: God called the expanse heaven. And there was evening and there was morning, a second day.
v.NIV: God called the vault "sky." And there was evening, and there was morning—the second day.
v.NRSV: God called the dome Sky. And there was evening and there was morning, the second day.
v.SAENEW: 하나님이 창공을 하늘이라고 하셨다. 저녁이 되고 아침이 되니, 이튿날이 지났다.
v.WLB: 하나님께서 이 공간을 ‘하늘’이라 부르셨습니다. 저녁이 되고 아침이 되니 둘째 날이었습니다.

v.CNV: 神说：“天下的水要聚在一处，使旱地露出来！”事就这样成了。
v.ESV: And God said, "Let the waters under the heavens be gathered together into one place, and let the dry land appear." And it was so.
v.GAE: 하나님이 이르시되 천하의 물이 한 곳으로 모이고 뭍이 드러나라 하시니 그대로 되니라
v.KJV: And God said, Let the waters under the heaven be gathered together unto one place, and let the dry land appear: and it was so.
v.NASB: Then God said, 'Let the waters below the heavens be gathered into one place, and let the dry land appear'; and it was so.
v.NIV: And God said, "Let the water under the sky be gathered to one place, and let dry ground appear." And it was so.
v.NRSV: And God said, “Let the waters under the sky be gathered together into one place, and let the dry land appear.” And it was so.
v.SAENEW: 하나님이 말씀하시기를 "하늘 아래에 있는 물은 한 곳으로 모이고, 뭍은 드러나거라" 하시니, 그대로 되었다.
v.WLB: 하나님께서 말씀하시기를 “하늘 아래의 물은 한 곳에 모이고 뭍이 드러나라” 하시니 그대로 됐습니다.

v.CNV: 神称旱地为地，称水的聚处为海。　神看这是好的。
v.ESV: God called the dry land Earth, and the waters that were gathered together he called Seas. And God saw that it was good.
v.GAE: 하나님이 뭍을 땅이라 부르시고 모인 물을 바다라 부르시니 하나님이 보시기에 좋았더라
v.KJV: And God called the dry land Earth; and the gathering together of the waters called he Seas: and God saw that it was good.
v.NASB: God called the dry land earth, and the gathering of the waters He called seas; and God saw that it was good.
v.NIV: God called the dry ground “land,” and the gathered waters he called “seas.” And God saw that it was good.
v.NRSV: God called the dry land Earth, and the waters that were gathered together he called Seas. And God saw that it was good.
v.SAENEW: 하나님이 뭍을 땅이라고 하시고, 모인 물을 바다라고 하셨다. 하나님 보시기에 좋았다.
v.WLB: 하나님께서 이 뭍을 ‘땅’이라 부르시고 모인 물을 ‘바다’라 부르셨습니다. 하나님께서 보시기에 좋았습니다.

v.CNV: 神说：“地上要长出青草、结种子的蔬菜和结果子的树木，各从其类，在地上的果子都包着核！”事就这样成了。
v.ESV: And God said, "Let the earth sprout vegetation, plants yielding seed, and fruit trees bearing fruit in which is their seed, each according to its kind, on the earth." And it was so.
v.GAE: 하나님이 이르시되 땅은 풀과 씨 맺는 채소와 각기 종류대로 씨 가진 열매 맺는 나무를 내라 하시니 그대로 되어
v.KJV: And God said, Let the earth bring forth grass, the herb yielding seed, and the fruit tree yielding fruit after his kind, whose seed is in itself, upon the earth: and it was so.
v.NASB: Then God said, 'Let the earth sprout vegetation: plants yielding seed, and fruit trees on the earth bearing fruit after their kind with seed in them'; and it was so.
v.NIV: Then God said, "Let the land produce vegetation: seed-bearing plants and trees on the land that bear fruit with seed in it, according to their various kinds." And it was so.
v.NRSV: Then God said, “Let the earth put forth vegetation: plants yielding seed, and fruit trees of every kind on earth that bear fruit with the seed in it.” And it was so.
v.SAENEW: 하나님이 말씀하시기를 "땅은 푸른 움을 돋아나게 하여라. 씨를 맺는 식물과 씨 있는 열매를 맺는 나무가 그 종류대로 땅 위에서 돋아나게 하여라" 하시니, 그대로 되었다.
v.WLB: 하나님께서 말씀하시기를 “땅은 식물, 곧 씨를 맺는 식물과 씨가 든 열매를 맺는 나무를 그 종류대로 땅 위에 내라” 하시니 그대로 됐습니다.

v.CNV: 于是，地上长出了青草和结种子的蔬菜，各从其类；又长出结果子的树木，各从其类，果子都包着核。　神看这是好的。
v.ESV: The earth brought forth vegetation, plants yielding seed according to their own kinds, and trees bearing fruit in which is their seed, each according to its kind. And God saw that it was good.
v.GAE: 땅이 풀과 각기 종류대로 씨 맺는 채소와 각기 종류대로 씨 가진 열매 맺는 나무를 내니 하나님이 보시기에 좋았더라
v.KJV: And the earth brought forth grass, and herb yielding seed after his kind, and the tree yielding fruit, whose seed was in itself, after his kind: and God saw that it was good.
v.NASB: The earth brought forth vegetation, plants yielding seed after their kind, and trees bearing fruit with seed in them, after their kind; and God saw that it was good.
v.NIV: The land produced vegetation: plants bearing seed according to their kinds and trees bearing fruit with seed in it according to their kinds. And God saw that it was good.
v.NRSV: The earth brought forth vegetation: plants yielding seed of every kind, and trees of every kind bearing fruit with the seed in it. And God saw that it was good.
v.SAENEW: 땅은 푸른 움을 돋아나게 하고, 씨를 맺는 식물을 그 종류대로 나게 하고, 씨 있는 열매를 맺는 나무를 그 종류대로 돋아나게 하였다. 하나님 보시기에 좋았다.
v.WLB: 땅이 식물, 곧 씨를 맺는 실물을 그 종류대로, 씨가 든 열매를 맺는 나무를 그 종류대로 냈습니다. 하나님께서 보시기에 좋았습니다.

v.CNV: 有晚上，有早晨；这是第三日。
v.ESV: And there was evening and there was morning, the third day.
v.GAE: 저녁이 되고 아침이 되니 이는 셋째 날이니라
v.KJV: And the evening and the morning were the third day.
v.NASB: There was evening and there was morning, a third day.
v.NIV: And there was evening, and there was morning—the third day.
v.NRSV: And there was evening and there was morning, the third day.
v.SAENEW: 저녁이 되고 아침이 되니, 사흗날이 지났다.
v.WLB: 저녁이 되고 아침이 되니 셋째 날이었습니다.

v.CNV: 神说：“在天上穹苍中，要有光体来分昼夜；这些光体要作为记号，定节令、日子和年岁；
v.ESV: And God said, "Let there be lights in the expanse of the heavens to separate the day from the night. And let them be for signs and for seasons, and for days and years,
v.GAE: 하나님이 이르시되 하늘의 궁창에 광명체들이 있어 낮과 밤을 나뉘게 하고 그것들로 징조와 계절과 날과 해를 이루게 하라
v.KJV: And God said, Let there be lights in the firmament of the heaven to divide the day from the night; and let them be for signs, and for seasons, and for days, and years:
v.NASB: Then God said, 'Let there be lights in the expanse of the heavens to separate the day from the night, and let them be for signs and for seasons and for days and years;
v.NIV: And God said, "Let there be lights in the vault of the sky to separate the day from the night, and let them serve as signs to mark sacred times, and days and years,
v.NRSV: And God said, “Let there be lights in the dome of the sky to separate the day from the night; and let them be for signs and for seasons and for days and years,
v.SAENEW: 하나님이 말씀하시기를 "하늘 창공에 빛나는 것들이 생겨서, 낮과 밤을 가르고, 계절과 날과 해를 나타내는 표가 되어라.
v.WLB: 하나님께서 말씀하시기를 “하늘 공간에 빛들이 생겨 낮과 밤을 나누고 절기들과 날짜들 및 연도들을 나타내는 표시가 되게 하라.

v.CNV: 它们要在天上穹苍中发光，照耀地上！”事就这样成了。
v.ESV: and let them be lights in the expanse of the heavens to give light upon the earth." And it was so.
v.GAE: 또 광명체들이 하늘의 궁창에 있어 땅을 비추라 하시니 그대로 되니라
v.KJV: And let them be for lights in the firmament of the heaven to give light upon the earth: and it was so.
v.NASB: and let them be for lights in the expanse of the heavens to give light on the earth'; and it was so.
v.NIV: and let them be lights in the vault of the sky to give light on the earth." And it was so.
v.NRSV: and let them be lights in the dome of the sky to give light upon the earth.” And it was so.
v.SAENEW: 또 하늘 창공에 있는 빛나는 것들은 땅을 환히 비추어라" 하시니, 그대로 되었다.
v.WLB: 그리고 이것들이 하늘 공간의 빛이 돼 땅에 비추게 하라” 하시니 그대로 됐습니다.

v.CNV: 于是，　神造了两个大光体，大的管昼，小的管夜；又造了星星。
v.ESV: And God made the two great lights—the greater light to rule the day and the lesser light to rule the night—and the stars.
v.GAE: 하나님이 두 큰 광명체를 만드사 큰 광명체로 낮을 주관하게 하시고 작은 광명체로 밤을 주관하게 하시며 또 별들을 만드시고
v.KJV: And God made two great lights; the greater light to rule the day, and the lesser light to rule the night: he made the stars also.
v.NASB: God made the two great lights, the greater light to govern the day, and the lesser light to govern the night; He made the stars also.
v.NIV: God made two great lights—the greater light to govern the day and the lesser light to govern the night. He also made the stars.
v.NRSV: God made the two great lights — the greater light to rule the day and the lesser light to rule the night — and the stars.
v.SAENEW: 하나님이 두 큰 빛을 만드시고, 둘 가운데서 큰 빛으로는 낮을 다스리게 하시고, 작은 빛으로는 밤을 다스리게 하셨다. 또 별들도 만드셨다.
v.WLB: 하나님께서 두 개의 큰 빛을 만들고 그 가운데 큰 것으로는 낮을 다스리게 하시고 작은 것으로는 밤을 다스리게 하셨습니다. 또한 별들도 만드셨습니다.

v.CNV: 神把这些光体安放在天上穹苍中，照耀地上，
v.ESV: And God set them in the expanse of the heavens to give light on the earth,
v.GAE: 하나님이 그것들을 하늘의 궁창에 두어 땅을 비추게 하시며
v.KJV: And God set them in the firmament of the heaven to give light upon the earth,
v.NASB: God placed them in the expanse of the heavens to give light on the earth,
v.NIV: God set them in the vault of the sky to give light on the earth,
v.NRSV: God set them in the dome of the sky to give light upon the earth,
v.SAENEW: 하나님이 빛나는 것들을 하늘 창공에 두시고 땅을 비추게 하시고,
v.WLB: 하나님께서 이것들을 하늘 공간에 두셔서 땅을 비추게 하시고

v.CNV: 管昼夜，分光暗。　神看这是好的。
v.ESV: to rule over the day and over the night, and to separate the light from the darkness. And God saw that it was good.
v.GAE: 낮과 밤을 주관하게 하시고 빛과 어둠을 나뉘게 하시니 하나님이 보시기에 좋았더라
v.KJV: And to rule over the day and over the night, and to divide the light from the darkness: and God saw that it was good.
v.NASB: and to govern the day and the night, and to separate the light from the darkness; and God saw that it was good.
v.NIV: to govern the day and the night, and to separate light from darkness. And God saw that it was good.
v.NRSV: to rule over the day and over the night, and to separate the light from the darkness. And God saw that it was good.
v.SAENEW: 낮과 밤을 다스리게 하시며, 빛과 어둠을 가르게 하셨다. 하나님 보시기에 좋았다.
v.WLB: 낮과 밤을 다스리고 빛과 어둠을 나누게 하셨습니다. 하나님께서 보시기에 좋았습니다.

v.CNV: 有晚上，有早晨；这是第四日。
v.ESV: And there was evening and there was morning, the fourth day.
v.GAE: 저녁이 되고 아침이 되니 이는 넷째 날이니라
v.KJV: And the evening and the morning were the fourth day.
v.NASB: There was evening and there was morning, a fourth day.
v.NIV: And there was evening, and there was morning—the fourth day.
v.NRSV: And there was evening and there was morning, the fourth day.
v.SAENEW: 저녁이 되고 아침이 되니, 나흗날이 지났다.
v.WLB: 저녁이 되고 아침이 되니 넷째 날이었습니다.

v.CNV: 神说：“水要滋长生物；地上和天空之中，要有雀鸟飞翔！”
v.ESV: And God said, "Let the waters swarm with swarms of living creatures, and let birds fly above the earth across the expanse of the heavens."
v.GAE: 하나님이 이르시되 물들은 생물을 번성하게 하라 땅 위 하늘의 궁창에는 새가 날으라 하시고
v.KJV: And God said, Let the waters bring forth abundantly the moving creature that hath life, and fowl that may fly above the earth in the open firmament of heaven.
v.NASB: Then God said, 'Let the waters teem with swarms of living creatures, and let birds fly above the earth in the open expanse of the heavens.'
v.NIV: And God said, "Let the water teem with living creatures, and let birds fly above the earth across the vault of the sky."
v.NRSV: And God said, “Let the waters bring forth swarms of living creatures, and let birds fly above the earth across the dome of the sky.”
v.SAENEW: 하나님이 말씀하시기를 "물은 생물을 번성하게 하고, 새들은 땅 위 하늘 창공으로 날아다녀라" 하셨다.
v.WLB: 하나님께서 말씀하시기를 “물에는 생물 떼가 번성하고 새들은 땅 위 하늘에서 날아다니라” 하셨습니다.

v.CNV: 于是，　神创造了大鱼和在水中滋生各种能活动的生物，各从其类；又创造了各种有翅膀的飞鸟，各从其类。　神看这是好的。
v.ESV: So God created the great sea creatures and every living creature that moves, with which the waters swarm, according to their kinds, and every winged bird according to its kind. And God saw that it was good.
v.GAE: 하나님이 큰 바다 짐승들과 물에서 번성하여 움직이는 모든 생물을 그 종류대로, 날개 있는 모든 새를 그 종류대로 창조하시니 하나님이 보시기에 좋았더라
v.KJV: And God created great whales, and every living creature that moveth, which the waters brought forth abundantly, after their kind, and every winged fowl after his kind: and God saw that it was good.
v.NASB: God created the great sea monsters and every living creature that moves, with which the waters swarmed after their kind, and every winged bird after its kind; and God saw that it was good.
v.NIV: So God created the great creatures of the sea and every living thing with which the water teems and that moves about in it, according to their kinds, and every winged bird according to its kind. And God saw that it was good.
v.NRSV: So God created the great sea monsters and every living creature that moves, of every kind, with which the waters swarm, and every winged bird of every kind. And God saw that it was good.
v.SAENEW: 하나님이 커다란 바다 짐승들과 물에서 번성하는 움직이는 모든 생물을 그 종류대로 창조하시고, 날개 달린 모든 새를 그 종류대로 창조하셨다. 하나님 보시기에 좋았다.
v.WLB: 하나님께서 큰 바다 생물들과 물에서 번성하는 온갖 생물들을 그 종류대로, 온갖 날개 달린 새들을 그 종류대로 창조하셨습니다. 하나님께서 보시기에 좋았습니다.

v.CNV: 神就赐福给它们，说：“要繁殖增多，充满海洋；雀鸟也要在地上增多！”
v.ESV: And God blessed them, saying, "Be fruitful and multiply and fill the waters in the seas, and let birds multiply on the earth."
v.GAE: 하나님이 그들에게 복을 주시며 이르시되 생육하고 번성하여 여러 바닷물에 충만하라 새들도 땅에 번성하라 하시니라
v.KJV: And God blessed them, saying, Be fruitful, and multiply, and fill the waters in the seas, and let fowl multiply in the earth.
v.NASB: God blessed them, saying, 'Be fruitful and multiply, and fill the waters in the seas, and let birds multiply on the earth.'
v.NIV: God blessed them and said, "Be fruitful and increase in number and fill the water in the seas, and let the birds increase on the earth."
v.NRSV: God blessed them, saying, “Be fruitful and multiply and fill the waters in the seas, and let birds multiply on the earth.”
v.SAENEW: 하나님이 이것들에게 복을 베푸시면서 말씀하시기를 "생육하고 번성하여 여러 바닷물에 충만하여라. 새들도 땅 위에서 번성하여라" 하셨다.
v.WLB: 하나님께서 그들에게 복을 주시며 말씀하시기를 “새끼를 많이 낳고 번성해 바닷물에 가득 채우라. 새들은 땅에서 번성하라” 하셨습니다.

v.CNV: 有晚上，有早晨；这是第五日。
v.ESV: And there was evening and there was morning, the fifth day.
v.GAE: 저녁이 되고 아침이 되니 이는 다섯째 날이니라
v.KJV: And the evening and the morning were the fifth day.
v.NASB: There was evening and there was morning, a fifth day.
v.NIV: And there was evening, and there was morning—the fifth day.
v.NRSV: And there was evening and there was morning, the fifth day.
v.SAENEW: 저녁이 되고 아침이 되니, 닷샛날이 지났다.
v.WLB: 저녁이 되고 아침이 되니 다섯째 날이었습니다.

v.CNV: 神说：“地上要生出活物来，各从其类；牲畜、昆虫和地上的野兽，各从其类！”事就这样成了。
v.ESV: And God said, "Let the earth bring forth living creatures according to their kinds—livestock and creeping things and beasts of the earth according to their kinds." And it was so.
v.GAE: 하나님이 이르시되 땅은 생물을 그 종류대로 내되 가축과 기는 것과 땅의 짐승을 종류대로 내라 하시니 그대로 되니라
v.KJV: And God said, Let the earth bring forth the living creature after his kind, cattle, and creeping thing, and beast of the earth after his kind: and it was so.
v.NASB: Then God said, 'Let the earth bring forth living creatures after their kind: cattle and creeping things and beasts of the earth after their kind'; and it was so.
v.NIV: And God said, "Let the land produce living creatures according to their kinds: the livestock, the creatures that move along the ground, and the wild animals, each according to its kind." And it was so.
v.NRSV: And God said, “Let the earth bring forth living creatures of every kind: cattle and creeping things and wild animals of the earth of every kind.” And it was so.
v.SAENEW: 하나님이 말씀하시기를 "땅은 생물을 그 종류대로 내어라. 집짐승과 기어다니는 것과 들짐승을 그 종류대로 내어라" 하시니, 그대로 되었다.
v.WLB: 하나님께서 말씀하시기를 “땅은 생물을 그 종류대로, 곧 가축과 땅 위에 기는 것과 들짐승을 그 종류대로 내라” 하시니 그대로 됐습니다.

v.CNV: 于是，　神造了地上的野兽，各从其类；牲畜，各从其类；地上的各种昆虫，各从其类。　神看这是好的。
v.ESV: And God made the beasts of the earth according to their kinds and the livestock according to their kinds, and everything that creeps on the ground according to its kind. And God saw that it was good.
v.GAE: 하나님이 땅의 짐승을 그 종류대로, 가축을 그 종류대로, 땅에 기는 모든 것을 그 종류대로 만드시니 하나님이 보시기에 좋았더라
v.KJV: And God made the beast of the earth after his kind, and cattle after their kind, and every thing that creepeth upon the earth after his kind: and God saw that it was good.
v.NASB: God made the beasts of the earth after their kind, and the cattle after their kind, and everything that creeps on the ground after its kind; and God saw that it was good.
v.NIV: God made the wild animals according to their kinds, the livestock according to their kinds, and all the creatures that move along the ground according to their kinds. And God saw that it was good.
v.NRSV: God made the wild animals of the earth of every kind, and the cattle of every kind, and everything that creeps upon the ground of every kind. And God saw that it was good.
v.SAENEW: 하나님이 들짐승을 그 종류대로, 집짐승도 그 종류대로, 들에 사는 모든 길짐승도 그 종류대로 만드셨다. 하나님 보시기에 좋았다.
v.WLB: 하나님께서 들짐승을 그 종류대로, 가축을 그 종류대로, 땅에 기는 모든 것을 그 종류대로 만드셨습니다. 하나님께서 보시기에 좋았습니다.

v.CNV: 神说：“我们要照着我们的形象，按着我们的样式造人；使他们管理海里的鱼、空中的鸟、地上的牲畜，以及全地，和地上所有爬行的生物！”
v.ESV: Then God said, "Let us make man in our image, after our likeness. And let them have dominion over the fish of the sea and over the birds of the heavens and over the livestock and over all the earth and over every creeping thing that creeps on the earth."
v.GAE: 하나님이 이르시되 우리의 형상을 따라 우리의 모양대로 우리가 사람을 만들고 그들로 바다의 물고기와 하늘의 새와 가축과 온 땅과 땅에 기는 모든 것을 다스리게 하자 하시고
v.KJV: And God said, Let us make man in our image, after our likeness: and let them have dominion over the fish of the sea, and over the fowl of the air, and over the cattle, and over all the earth, and over every creeping thing that creepeth upon the earth.
v.NASB: Then God said, 'Let Us make man in Our image, according to Our likeness; and let them rule over the fish of the sea and over the birds of the sky and over the cattle and over all the earth, and over every creeping thing that creeps on the earth.'
v.NIV: Then God said, "Let us make mankind in our image, in our likeness, so that they may rule over the fish in the sea and the birds in the sky, over the livestock and all the wild animals, and over all the creatures that move along the ground."
v.NRSV: Then God said, “Let us make humankind in our image, according to our likeness; and let them have dominion over the fish of the sea, and over the birds of the air, and over the cattle, and over all the wild animals of the earth, and over every creeping thing that creeps upon the earth.”
v.SAENEW: 하나님이 말씀하시기를 "우리가 우리의 형상을 따라서, 우리의 모양대로 사람을 만들자. 그리고 그가, 바다의 고기와 공중의 새와 땅 위에 사는 온갖 들짐승과 땅 위를 기어다니는 모든 길짐승을 다스리게 하자" 하시고,
v.WLB: 하나님께서 말씀하시기를 “우리가 우리의 형상대로 우리의 모양을 따라 사람을 만들어 그들이 바다의 물고기와 공중의 새와 가축과 온 땅과 땅 위에 기는 모든 것을 다스리게 하자” 하시고

v.CNV: 于是，　神照着自己的形象创造人；就是照着他的形象创造了人；他所创造的有男有女。
v.ESV: So God created man in his own image, in the image of God he created him; male and female he created them.
v.GAE: 하나님이 자기 형상 곧 하나님의 형상대로 사람을 창조하시되 남자와 여자를 창조하시고
v.KJV: So God created man in his own image, in the image of God created he him; male and female created he them.
v.NASB: God created man in His own image, in the image of God He created him; male and female He created them.
v.NIV: So God created mankind in his own image, in the image of God he created them; male and female he created them.
v.NRSV: So God created humankind in his image, in the image of God he created them; male and female he created them.
v.SAENEW: 하나님이 당신의 형상대로 사람을 창조하셨으니, 곧 하나님의 형상대로 사람을 창조하셨다. 하나님이 그들을 남자와 여자로 창조하셨다.
v.WLB: 하나님께서 사람을 그분의 형상대로 창조하시니, 곧 하나님의 형상대로 사람을 창조하시되 하나님께서 그들을 남자와 여자로 창조하셨습니다.

v.CNV: 神就赐福给他们，对他们说：“要繁殖增多，充满这地，征服它；也要管理海里的鱼、空中的鸟和地上爬行的所有生物。”
v.ESV: And God blessed them. And God said to them, "Be fruitful and multiply and fill the earth and subdue it, and have dominion over the fish of the sea and over the birds of the heavens and over every living thing that moves on the earth."
v.GAE: 하나님이 그들에게 복을 주시며 하나님이 그들에게 이르시되 생육하고 번성하여 땅에 충만하라, 땅을 정복하라, 바다의 물고기와 하늘의 새와 땅에 움직이는 모든 생물을 다스리라 하시니라
v.KJV: And God blessed them, and God said unto them, Be fruitful, and multiply, and replenish the earth, and subdue it: and have dominion over the fish of the sea, and over the fowl of the air, and over every living thing that moveth upon the earth.
v.NASB: God blessed them; and God said to them, 'Be fruitful and multiply, and fill the earth, and subdue it; and rule over the fish of the sea and over the birds of the sky and over every living thing that moves on the earth.'
v.NIV: God blessed them and said to them, "Be fruitful and increase in number; fill the earth and subdue it. Rule over the fish in the sea and the birds in the sky and over every living creature that moves on the ground."
v.NRSV: God blessed them, and God said to them, “Be fruitful and multiply, and fill the earth and subdue it; and have dominion over the fish of the sea and over the birds of the air and over every living thing that moves upon the earth.”
v.SAENEW: 하나님이 그들에게 복을 베푸셨다. 하나님이 그들에게 말씀하시기를 "생육하고 번성하여 땅에 충만하여라. 땅을 정복하여라. 바다의 고기와 공중의 새와 땅 위에서 살아 움직이는 모든 생물을 다스려라" 하셨다.
v.WLB: 하나님께서 그들에게 복을 주시며 그들에게 말씀하시기를 “자식을 많이 낳고 번성해 땅에 가득하고 땅을 정복하라. 바다의 물고기와 공중의 새와 땅 위에 기는 모든 생물을 다스리라” 하셨습니다.

v.CNV: 神说：“看哪！我把全地上结种子的各样蔬菜，和一切果树上有种子的果子，都赐给你们作食物。
v.ESV: And God said, "Behold, I have given you every plant yielding seed that is on the face of all the earth, and every tree with seed in its fruit. You shall have them for food.
v.GAE: 하나님이 이르시되 내가 온 지면의 씨 맺는 모든 채소와 씨 가진 열매 맺는 모든 나무를 너희에게 주노니 너희의 먹을 거리가 되리라
v.KJV: And God said, Behold, I have given you every herb bearing seed, which is upon the face of all the earth, and every tree, in the which is the fruit of a tree yielding seed; to you it shall be for meat.
v.NASB: Then God said, 'Behold, I have given you every plant yielding seed that is on the surface of all the earth, and every tree which has fruit yielding seed; it shall be food for you;
v.NIV: Then God said, "I give you every seed-bearing plant on the face of the whole earth and every tree that has fruit with seed in it. They will be yours for food.
v.NRSV: God said, “See, I have given you every plant yielding seed that is upon the face of all the earth, and every tree with seed in its fruit; you shall have them for food.
v.SAENEW: 하나님이 말씀하시기를 "내가 온 땅 위에 있는 씨 맺는 모든 채소와 씨 있는 열매를 맺는 모든 나무를 너희에게 준다. 이것들이 너희의 먹거리가 될 것이다.
v.WLB: 하나님께서 말씀하시기를 “내가 땅 위의 씨 맺는 온갖 식물과 씨가 든 열매를 맺는 온갖 나무를 너희에게 주었으니 이것들이 너희의 먹을 양식이 될 것이다.

v.CNV: 至于地上的各种野兽，空中的各种飞鸟，和地上爬行有生命的各种活物，我把一切青草蔬菜赐给它们作食物。”事就这样成了。
v.ESV: And to every beast of the earth and to every bird of the heavens and to everything that creeps on the earth, everything that has the breath of life, I have given every green plant for food." And it was so.
v.GAE: 또 땅의 모든 짐승과 하늘의 모든 새와 생명이 있어 땅에 기는 모든 것에게는 내가 모든 푸른 풀을 먹을 거리로 주노라 하시니 그대로 되니라
v.KJV: And to every beast of the earth, and to every fowl of the air, and to every thing that creepeth upon the earth, wherein there is life, I have given every green herb for meat: and it was so.
v.NASB: and to every beast of the earth and to every bird of the sky and to every thing that moves on the earth which has life, I have given every green plant for food'; and it was so.
v.NIV: And to all the beasts of the earth and all the birds in the sky and all the creatures that move along the ground—everything that has the breath of life in it—I give every green plant for food." And it was so.
v.NRSV: And to every beast of the earth, and to every bird of the air, and to everything that creeps on the earth, everything that has the breath of life, I have given every green plant for food.” And it was so.
v.SAENEW: 또 땅의 모든 짐승과 공중의 모든 새와 땅 위에 사는 모든 것, 곧 생명을 지닌 모든 것에게도 모든 푸른 풀을 먹거리로 준다" 하시니, 그대로 되었다.
v.WLB: 그리고 땅의 모든 짐승과 공중의 모든 새와 땅 위에 기는 모든 것들, 곧 생명 있는 모든 것들에게는 내가 온갖 푸른 풀을 먹이로 주었다” 하시니 그대로 됐습니다.

v.CNV: 神看他所造的一切都很好。有晚上，有早晨；这是第六日。
v.ESV: And God saw everything that he had made, and behold, it was very good. And there was evening and there was morning, the sixth day.
v.GAE: 하나님이 지으신 그 모든 것을 보시니 보시기에 심히 좋았더라 저녁이 되고 아침이 되니 이는 여섯째 날이니라
v.KJV: And God saw every thing that he had made, and, behold, it was very good. And the evening and the morning were the sixth day.
v.NASB: God saw all that He had made, and behold, it was very good. And there was evening and there was morning, the sixth day.
v.NIV: God saw all that he had made, and it was very good. And there was evening, and there was morning—the sixth day.
v.NRSV: God saw everything that he had made, and indeed, it was very good. And there was evening and there was morning, the sixth day.
v.SAENEW: 하나님이 손수 만드신 모든 것을 보시니, 보시기에 참 좋았다. 저녁이 되고 아침이 되니, 엿샛날이 지났다.
v.WLB: 하나님께서 자신이 만드신 모든 것을 보시니 참 좋았습니다. 저녁이 되고 아침이 되니 여섯째 날이었습니다.
